# Vendored dependencies

## qrcode.js

Source: https://github.com/kazuhikoarase/qrcode-generator (`js/dist/qrcode.js`)
License: MIT (Copyright (c) 2009 Kazuhiko Arase — see header in the file)

Vendored instead of loaded from a CDN so this page keeps working when hosted
standalone (e.g. `stream.prod.ilwg.us/qr`) with no external network dependency
and no build step. Unmodified from upstream.
